Class MemorizedResultSetTransformer.ListAggregation

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.modelbuilder.MemorizedResultSetTransformer.ListAggregation
All Implemented Interfaces:
MemorizedResultSetTransformer.AggregateFunction
Enclosing class:
MemorizedResultSetTransformer
public static class MemorizedResultSetTransformer.ListAggregation extends Object implements MemorizedResultSetTransformer.AggregateFunction
An aggregate function that concatenates non-null values as a comma-separated list.

      public Object eval(List<Object[]> group, int columnIndex)
      Description copied from interface: MemorizedResultSetTransformer.AggregateFunction
      Evaluates the aggregate function over the given group of rows.
      Specified by:
      eval in interface MemorizedResultSetTransformer.AggregateFunction
      Parameters:
      group - the group of rows to aggregate
      columnIndex - the 0-based column index to aggregate
      Returns:
      the aggregated value
